required_preferences.fact: Coordinates video calls and cross-office project meetings from both home and office throughout the week, regularly joining early mornings or late-afternoon sessions to accommodate multiple time zones — no longer restricts work meetings to in-office hours or locations.

supersedes.fact: Schedules all video calls and meetings exclusively from the office or designated on-site conference rooms — no remote work coordination except during travel.

required_preferences.fact: Spends in-person time with her parents every evening the kids are with her, as they now live together — no longer does daily check-in calls

supersedes.fact: Calls her parents for a quick evening check-in every day the kids are with her — never misses a day

required_preferences.fact: Schedules all childcare and school pickups through her parents or ex-husband; refuses to make plans that rely on her solo driving or transport until medically cleared.
Joins supervised family walks in neighborhood parks on weekends instead of driving to distant outings; avoids any activities requiring personal transportation.
Sets medication reminders for daily iron supplements and weekly iron level tracking, using phone alerts and a pill organizer to ensure strict adherence.

Blocks Friday family routines from work interruptions, refusing to schedule non-urgent meetings or client calls on Fridays to safeguard dedicated recovery and bonding time after a week of cross-office demands.

persona: A single parent planning annual vacations for their two children
